creator: alt2600@icloud.com
text:
Created attachment 236425
Makefile-git-fixhtml-doc-path.patch

===>>> Building the port required 15 seconds
===>  Staging for pydbus-common-1.3.2
===>   Generating temporary packing list
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/stage/usr/local/include/dbus-1.0/dbus/
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/dbus-python-1.3.2/include/dbus/dbus-python.h  /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/stage/usr/local/include/dbus-1.0/dbus/dbus-python.h
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/dbus-python-1.3.2/dbus-python.pc  /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/stage/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/dbus-python.pc
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/stage/usr/local/share/examples/py-dbus &&  install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/dbus-python-1.3.2/examples/*.py /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/stage/usr/local/share/examples/py-dbus
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/py-dbus &&  install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/dbus-python-1.3.2/doc/*.txt /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/py-dbus &&  install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/dbus-python-1.3.2/README /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/py-dbus &&  install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/dbus-python-1.3.2/NEWS /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/py-dbus
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/dbus-python-1.3.2/doc/_build/*.html /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/py-dbus
install: /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/dbus-python-1.3.2/doc/_build/*.html: No such file or directory
*** Error code 71

the html docs seem to be in /usr/ports/devel/pydbus-common/work/dbus-python-1.3.2/doc/html/*.html  now there is no _build in the worksrc/doc that or it isn't being "built" under ports amd64 13.1p1
